market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Immaculate 4 Bed House, Parking & Parking Free
£230/nt, Immaculate 4 Bed House in Popular Area
analysis.rewritten_desc: Treat yourself to a luxurious stay in our 4-bedroom house, located in the heart of [Location]. With a private parking spot and ample space for four guests, it's the perfect retreat for families or groups of friends. Our home boasts a beautifully designed interior, complete with comfortable furnishings and all the amenities you need to feel right at home. Take a short stroll to nearby attractions, or enjoy some peaceful downtime in our quiet neighborhood. We can't wait to welcome you!
top_amenity_gaps: Parking facilities should be explicitly mentioned and emphasized, especially considering the £230.6 nightly rate (£32% above the cohort median)
Entertainment options (e.g., TV, games) would be a valuable addition
Outdoor spaces or a garden would be a welcome feature
analysis.photo_order_rec: A photo of the living room should be the cover photo, as it showcases the property's interior and design
key_diagnosis: Increase parking mention: with a £230.6 nightly rate, guests expect free parking to be highlighted (current description lacks any mention of parking)
Improve occupancy by £3.30/nt vs the cohort median price (28.3% occupancy vs 25.0% for this listing)
Consider adding images of the kitchen and bedrooms to increase overall photo count
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £230.6 nightly rate makes free parking a crucial differentiator; would you consider highlighting this in the listing?
